# Synapse-Network-Docs Agent Map

This repository is the GitHub funnel, agent-readable map, and public-source mirror for SynapseNetwork docs pages that expose GitHub source links.

本仓库是 SynapseNetwork 的 GitHub 流量入口和 Agent 可读索引。

README language layout:

- English default: `README.md`
- Simplified Chinese: `README.zh-CN.md`
- Do not interleave English and Chinese in the same README body.

README 语言结构：

- 英文默认页：`README.md`
- 简体中文页：`README.zh-CN.md`
- 不要在同一个 README 正文中交替混排中英文。

## Read First

优先阅读。

1. `README.md` - public GitHub billboard and fast agent quickstart in English.
2. `README.zh-CN.md` - Simplified Chinese GitHub billboard and fast agent quickstart.
3. `llm-instructions.md` - compact prompt rules for coding agents.
4. `examples/` - copyable first-call examples.
5. `docs/` - lightweight links into the production docs site.
6. `content/docs/` - one-way public mirror of docs pages rendered from the private main repository.

1. `README.md` - 英文 GitHub 广告牌和快速接入。
2. `README.zh-CN.md` - 简体中文 GitHub 广告牌和快速接入。
3. `llm-instructions.md` - 给编码 Agent 使用的精简提示规则。
4. `examples/` - 可复制的首次调用示例。
5. `docs/` - 指向 production 文档站的轻量索引。
6. `content/docs/` - 私有主仓渲染文档页面的一份单向公开镜像。

## Canonical Product Docs

权威产品文档。

- Docs home: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/
- MCP integrations: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/mcp
- ChatGPT Custom MCP App: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/mcp/chatgpt
- Codex MCP: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/mcp/codex
- Official MCP Registry: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/mcp/registry
- SDK hub: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/sdks
- Python SDK: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/sdks/python
- TypeScript SDK: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/sdks/typescript
- Concepts: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/concepts/agent-settlement
- Contracts: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/smart-contracts
- Go SDK: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/sdks/go
- Java/JVM SDK: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/sdks/java
- .NET SDK: https://docs.synapse-network.ai/sdks/dotnet

## Public SDK Packages

- Python `synapse-network-ai-sdk==1.0.0`: https://pypi.org/project/synapse-network-ai-sdk/1.0.0/
- TypeScript `@synapse-network-ai/sdk@1.0.0`: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@synapse-network-ai/sdk/v/1.0.0
- Go `github.com/SynapseNetworkAI/Synapse-Network-Sdk/go@v1.0.0`: https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/SynapseNetworkAI/Synapse-Network-Sdk/go@v1.0.0
- Java `ai.synapse-network:synapse-network-sdk:1.0.0`: https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/ai/synapse-network/synapse-network-sdk/1.0.0/
- .NET `SynapseNetwork.Sdk 1.0.0`: https://www.nuget.org/packages/SynapseNetwork.Sdk/1.0.0
- Source repository: https://github.com/SynapseNetworkAI/Synapse-Network-Sdk
- MCP package `@synapse-network-ai/mcp-server`: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@synapse-network-ai/mcp-server
- MCP registry name `io.github.SynapseNetworkAI/synapse-network-mcp-server`: https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/v0.1/servers?search=SynapseNetworkAI

## V1 Docs Contribution Rule

Public docs pages may link to this repository for source viewing, but do not add "Edit this page" flows to the product docs site until rendered pages are generated from this repository. Use GitHub Issues for docs feedback in V1.

公开 docs 页面可以把源码查看链接指向本仓库，但在渲染页面由本仓库生成之前，不要在产品文档站添加 “Edit this page” 交互。V1 阶段使用 GitHub Issues 收集文档反馈。

## Brand Constraint

Product name is SynapseNetwork. Do not rename the product to old agent-payment brand labels.

SynapseNetwork is an AI-native API commerce, payment, and settlement platform. Agents call APIs through the platform and pay small USDC-priced amounts through blockchain-backed settlement.

## 品牌约束

产品名是 SynapseNetwork。不要把产品命名为旧的 agent-payment 品牌词。

SynapseNetwork 是面向 AI Agent 的 API 调用、支付与结算平台。Agent 通过平台调用接口，并通过区块链支持的 USDC 结算完成小额付款。

## Agent Runtime Rule

Agent integrations should prefer `SynapseClient` with an `agt_xxx` Agent Key. Do not use owner wallet or `SynapseAuth` flows unless the user explicitly asks for owner/admin setup.

Agent 接入应优先使用 `SynapseClient` 和 `agt_xxx` Agent Key。除非用户明确要求 Owner/Admin 设置，否则不要使用 owner 钱包或 `SynapseAuth` 流程。

Public examples should read Agent Keys from `SYNAPSE_AGENT_KEY`, preserve USDC amounts as strings, and target `staging` for sandbox calls.

公开示例应从 `SYNAPSE_AGENT_KEY` 读取 Agent Key，保持 USDC 金额为字符串，并使用 `staging` 进行沙盒调用。

## MCP Runtime Rule

Hosted Remote MCP uses `https://mcp.synapse-network.ai/mcp`. Local stdio MCP uses `npx -y @synapse-network-ai/mcp-server`.

BYOK clients pass `Authorization: Bearer agt_xxx` or `SYNAPSE_AGENT_KEY`. OAuth clients such as ChatGPT custom MCP apps receive a Synapse OAuth token that maps server-side to a selected Agent Credential.

Treat `discover_services` and `get_receipt` as read-only. Treat `invoke_and_pay` as consequential because it can spend from the linked Agent Credential.
